entries.title: Daily Security Audit
entries.description: Sweep hosts every morning for CVE regressions and privilege drift. Posts a summary to the alert channel; suppresses delivery with [SILENT] when nothing changed since yesterday.
entries.promptTemplate:
Run the healthcheck skill against host group {host_group} and diff findings
against the previous run. Report new critical CVEs, changed sudoers, and
new listening ports to the {alert_channel} Slack channel. If nothing new,
reply exactly "[SILENT]" so delivery is suppressed.

slots.label: Hour of day (0-23)
slots.description: Local-time hour to run the audit.

slots.label: Host group
slots.description: A hosts.yml group name to audit (e.g. "prod-webservers").

slots.label: Alert channel
slots.description: Slack channel to receive the summary.

entries.title: Hourly LLM Cost Watchdog
entries.description: Poll model-usage every hour; alert if the cumulative cost since midnight exceeds the threshold, so runaway loops don't burn a day's budget while the team is asleep.
entries.promptTemplate:
Use the model-usage skill to fetch the cost total since 00:00 today. If it
exceeds {threshold_usd} USD, post a warning to {alert_channel} naming the
top-spending session ids and their models. If below the threshold, reply
exactly "[SILENT]".

slots.label: Threshold (USD)
slots.description: Alert when day-to-date cost exceeds this dollar figure.

slots.label: Alert channel
slots.description: Slack channel to receive the warning.

entries.title: Weekly GitHub PR Review Digest
entries.description: Every Friday, compile the list of open PRs older than the review SLA and post the digest for the team to triage.
entries.promptTemplate:
Use the github skill to list open PRs on {repo} that have been open more
than {sla_days} days without a review or with a stale review request.
Group by reviewer, sort by age, and post the digest to {channel}. Include
the PR title, author, days open, and last activity for each item.

slots.label: Hour of day (0-23)
slots.description: Local-time hour to post the digest.

slots.label: Review SLA (days)
slots.description: PRs older than this without review get flagged.

slots.label: Destination channel
slots.description: Slack channel that receives the digest.
